history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cells ahead are row 02 column C which is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe path is to turn down toward row 03 column B, which is empty. From facing right, turning clockwise makes me face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead, row 03 column B, is safe (`.`), so the best next move is to advance forward toward the open path leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 04 column B, is safe, and continuing downward keeps me in the open corridor toward the lower passage that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 05 column B, is safe, so I should keep moving forward toward the corridor that opens below.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 06 column B, is safe and continues into the open area below, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 07 column B, is lava, so I must avoid moving forward. The safe route is to turn right and head along row 06 toward the open space, which will eventually let me reach the goal from the right side.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left. The cell ahead to the left is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To continue toward the open corridor on row 06, I should turn clockwise to face down? No, that would lead toward lava at row 07. The better safe move is to turn counter-clockwise to face up, then I can navigate around the barrier.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am back at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I must not go forward. To reach the open area safely, I should turn left to face east and proceed along row 06.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing right. The cell ahead, row 06 column C, is safe floor, so moving forward is the best way to continue along the clear path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right. The path ahead on row 06 is clear, and moving forward keeps me on the safe corridor toward the right side of the map, which is the only viable approach to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D facing right. The corridor ahead on row 06 is still clear, so I should continue forward to move closer to the open passage toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E facing right. The safe route to the goal is to keep moving along row 06 toward the open right side, so advancing is the correct next step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F facing right. The cell ahead, row 06 column G, is safe and keeps me moving through the open corridor toward the right side where I can approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column G facing right. The next cell row 06 column H is still open and safe, so continuing forward is the best move to progress toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing right. The cell ahead would be outside the open corridor and the goal is below me at row 08 column H, so I need to turn rightward from facing east to face down. Rotating clockwise will set me to face down toward the path to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing down. The cell directly ahead, row 07 column H, is safe floor and moves me closer to the goal at row 08 column H, so I should go forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row 08 column H, and that cell is the goal `O`, so moving forward will reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
